data.title: Realsee, leader in digital space solutions, debuts at Inman Connect 2025, revolutionizing real estate industry with 3D tour technology.
data.description: Transforming the real estate sector through cutting-edge 3D tour technology, Realsee recently showcased its innovative solutions at the Inman Connect San Diego event in August 2025. Renowned as a key player in digital space offerings, the Chinese-based company is revolutionizing the industry with its state-of-the-art technology. This marks an important milestone for Realsee as it continues to disrupt the market with its advanced 3D tour capabilities.

data.title: New U.S.-Thailand trade deal gets underway, BOI underscores Thailand's competitive advantage as tariffs are adjusted.
data.description: On August 1, 2025, in Bangkok, Mr. Narit Therdsteerasukdi, Secretary General of the Board of Investment (BOI), addressed the impact of U.S. President Donald Trump's executive order adjusting tariffs on Thailand and other nations. The executive order has sparked concerns regarding changes in trade relations. Mr. Therdsteerasukdi reiterated Thailand's resilience in the face of these adjustments, highlighting the country's stable economic performance despite the tariff modifications. The specific alterations in tariffs and their implications on Thailand's trade sector were not disclosed. Thailand's economic stability and robust performance were emphasized amidst this tariff adjustment situation.

data.title: Linde plc reports Q2 2025 net income of $1,766 million, EPS of $3.73, and sales of $8,495 million; up 6%, 8%, and 3%, respectively.
data.description: In Woking, England, Linde plc (Nasdaq: LIN) announced their second-quarter 2025 financial results today. They reported a net income of $1,766 million and diluted earnings per share of $3.73, reflecting increases of 6% and 8%, respectively. Excluding Linde AG purchase accounting impacts, the adjusted net income stood at $1,937 million, a 4% rise from the prior year. Adjusted earnings per share were $4.09, marking a 6% increase compared to the previous year. The company's sales for the second quarter totaled $8,495 million, demonstrating a 3% growth from the previous year. The underlying sales increase was also noted in comparison to the prior year.

data.title: Fluor JV wins contract for front-end engineering & design of LNG Canada's second phase in British Columbia.
data.description: An announcement from Irving, Texas revealed that a joint venture involving Fluor has secured the Front End Engineering and Design contract for the potential second phase of the LNG Canada facility situated in British Columbia. This significant development marks a notable step forward in the project, highlighting the growing momentum in the energy sector. The contract is poised to propel the project forward and potentially significantly contribute to the energy infrastructure in the region. This milestone underscores the commitment to advancing energy solutions, with the potential to have far-reaching impacts on the industry.

data.title: Whale investor opens $50.47M Bitcoin and $23.89M Ethereum leverage bets amid market dip, risking liquidation at $87,424 and $1,810 respectively.
data.description: A seasoned investor known for successful trades recently made bold moves in the cryptocurrency market. This investor, boasting over $60 million in profits from various trading activities, decided to take a substantial risk by opening leveraged positions in Bitcoin and Ethereum. The investor opted for a 40x leverage on Bitcoin, increasing their position to $50.47 million with an entry price of $115,579.30. At the time of reporting, they faced a loss of approximately $516,000 on this bet, risking liquidation if Bitcoin dropped to $87,424. In parallel, the investor took a 25x leverage on Ethereum, enlarging their position to $23.89 million with an entry price of $3,697 and a liquidation point at $1,810. This move was prompted by a market dip on Thursday. For the full story, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Coinbase CEO says they partner, not compete, with Visa and Mastercard in crypto payments; emphasized collaborating on card projects.
data.description: During Coinbase Global Inc.'s CEO Brian Armstrong's recent announcement, he noted that the company sees Visa Inc. and Mastercard Inc. as partners in the expanding cryptocurrency payments sector rather than rivals. Armstrong stated during a second-quarter earnings call that they do not plan to create an alternative network to these industry giants. He emphasized that Coinbase collaborates with Visa and Mastercard on various card offerings and highlighted their significant involvement in stablecoins and cryptocurrency projects. Armstrong highlighted the partnership aspects with these companies, indicating a synergistic approach rather than competitive. This information was disclosed during the earnings call, with further details available on financial news platforms.

data.title: Interface, Inc. (Nasdaq: TILE) reports Q2 2025 results: Net sales $376M, up 8% YoY, earnings per diluted share $0.55.
data.description: In Atlanta today, Interface, Inc. revealed its second-quarter results, ending on June 29, 2025. The company, known for its commercial flooring solutions and commitment to sustainability, reported impressive figures compared to the previous year. Net sales soared by 8% to reach $376 million, marking a 7% increase on a currency neutral basis. Earnings per diluted share under GAAP stood at $0.55, reflecting a notable 45% surge. Adjusted earnings per diluted share saw an even larger spike, increasing by 50% to hit $0.60. Interface's ongoing strategic efforts continue to propel growth in the market.
S.Korea Trade Minister: There is no written agreement regarding Korea-US trade deal.

data.title: President Bukele of El Salvador granted indefinite reelection and extended terms to 6 years, amid criticism for authoritarian tendencies.
data.description: El Salvador has recently passed a law allowing for President Bukele to seek reelection indefinitely, while also extending presidential terms from four to six years. This move has generated criticism from various quarters, with critics voicing concerns about the potential increase in authoritarianism within the country.

data.title: Squarespace named best website creator for 2025 by Software Experts.
data.description: In a recent report by Software Experts, Squarespace has been acknowledged as the top all-in-one website builder for 2025. This recognition solidifies Squarespace's position as the best platform for digital presence and brand creation this year. With its user-friendly interface and innovative features, Squarespace has surpassed its competitors and stands out as the go-to choice for individuals and businesses looking to establish a strong online presence. The report highlights Squarespace's comprehensive tools and templates that cater to a wide range of users, making it the preferred website creation platform for many.
